component.name: AspectRatio
component.description: Constrain content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

useCases: Maintaining image aspect ratios in responsive layouts
Embedding videos or iframes at fixed proportions
Preventing layout shift while media loads

commonPatterns.name: responsive-image
commonPatterns.description: Image that maintains 16:9 ratio at any width

commonPatterns.name: square-thumbnail
commonPatterns.description: Square thumbnail for avatars or product images

antiPatterns.scenario: Using AspectRatio without a ratio prop
antiPatterns.reason: Without a ratio the component has no effect on layout
antiPatterns.alternative: Always provide an explicit ratio value

antiPatterns.reason: Competing ratio constraints produce unpredictable sizing
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a single AspectRatio at the outermost level

slots.children: Content to render inside the ratio box (images, video, iframes)

parentConstraints: Width must be set by the parent; height is derived from the ratio

responsive.mobile: Scales with parent width while maintaining ratio
responsive.desktop: Scales with parent width while maintaining ratio

rules: Child images should use object-cover or object-contain for proper fill
Set width on the parent — height is controlled by the ratio

aiHints.context: Use when you need to enforce a fixed aspect ratio on media or content containers. The ratio prop is width/height (e.g. 16/9).
